claim: Single-word prompt techniques like role-based prompting, structured format directives, and constraint-based keywords can immediately improve model output without complex engineering.
actionable: Experiment with single-word prompt modifiers (e.g., 'expert', 'detailed', 'concise') before building complex prompt templates.
source_title: ONE Word Prompts - 3 INSTANTLY useful Prompt Engineering Techniques

claim: Effective prompts often benefit from explicit format specifications that constrain model output to desired structure without requiring multiple retries.
actionable: Add format directives to your prompts (e.g., 'respond in JSON', 'use bullet points') to reduce output variability and parsing errors.
source_title: ONE Word Prompts - 3 INSTANTLY useful Prompt Engineering Techniques
